rag_rules: Place input assumptions and output guarantees in component type annexes when concrete bounds or visible relations are available
Use visible feature names in component type contracts; avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths
Write AGREE contracts inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use component type annexes for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings
generic_rules: Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
Use concrete bounds or visible relations for range assumptions and guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `eq` for equation declarations and `guarantee` for guarantees
Use `and` for logical conjunctions in range expressions
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range comparisons
Do not encode AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit exposure
Do not place assumptions or guarantees in invalid scopes
